channel.title: Whamcloud Community JIRA
channel.description: This file is an XML representation of an issue

item.title: [LU-2794] lu_object_assign_fid()) ASSERTION( shadow == ((void *)0) ) failed:
item.description:
Alex,
Could you please have a look at this one?

status.description: A resolution has been taken, and it is awaiting verification by reporter. From here issues are either reopened, or are closed.

comments.comment: Tested for four days on Hyperion with debug patch, issue did not reappear.
Cliff, would you mind to run with http://review.whamcloud.com/5437 to get additional info please?
I was attempting to run the performance tests (mdtest,ior) but had this popup right at the start of the run.

POTP-AUTH[5273]: root@hyperion-dit1.llnl.gov as root: cmd='lctl set_param panic_on_lbug=0; lctl set_param debug=-1; lctl set_param debug_mb=512'
Feb  7 15:20:44 hyperion-rst6 kernel: LustreError: 5230:0:(lu_object.c:2179:lu_object_assign_fid()) ASSERTION( shadow == ((void *)0) ) failed:
Feb  7 15:20:44 hyperion-rst6 kernel: LustreError: 5230:0:(lu_object.c:2179:lu_object_assign_fid()) ASSERTION( shadow == ((void *)0) ) failed:
